title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 09 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 09 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 09 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/02/2026
Today, the DCE iron ore market trended weaker. The benchmark contract, I2605, closed at 761.5 RMB/tonne,down 0.46% from the previous trading session. Spot prices in the physical market fell by 1-3 RMB/tonne compared to the prior day.
